'''âw-th-g''' ('''kawathag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quisle|quisle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-th-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quisle|quisle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-th-g
|-
! Lemma
| kawathag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwathag|thiwathag]] || [[word:jiwathag|jiwathag]] || [[word:shiwathag|shiwathag]] || [[word:kiwathag|kiwathag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwathag|thuthuwathag]] || [[word:jujuwathag|jujuwathag]] || [[word:shushuwathag|shushuwathag]] || [[word:kukuwathag|kukuwathag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwathag|thuwathag]] || [[word:juwathag|juwathag]] || [[word:shuwathag|shuwathag]] || [[word:kuwathag|kuwathag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwathag|thuwathag]] || [[word:juwathag|juwathag]] || [[word:shuwathag|shuwathag]] || [[word:kuwathag|kuwathag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewathag|thewathag]] || [[word:jewathag|jewathag]] || [[word:shewathag|shewathag]] || [[word:kewathag|kewathag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowathag|thothowathag]] || [[word:jojowathag|jojowathag]] || [[word:shoshowathag|shoshowathag]] || [[word:kokowathag|kokowathag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowathag|thowathag]] || [[word:jowathag|jowathag]] || [[word:showathag|showathag]] || [[word:kowathag|kowathag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowathag|thowathag]] || [[word:jowathag|jowathag]] || [[word:showathag|showathag]] || [[word:kowathag|kowathag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwathag|thĂŠwathag]] || [[word:jĂŠwathag|jĂŠwathag]] || [[word:shĂŠwathag|shĂŠwathag]] || [[word:kĂŠwathag|kĂŠwathag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawathag|thathawathag]] || [[word:jajawathag|jajawathag]] || [[word:shashawathag|shashawathag]] || [[word:kakawathag|kakawathag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawathag|thawathag]] || [[word:jawathag|jawathag]] || [[word:shawathag|shawathag]] || [[word:kawathag|kawathag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawathag|thawathag]] || [[word:jawathag|jawathag]] || [[word:shawathag|shawathag]] || [[word:kawathag|kawathag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawathag|shawathag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawathag|goshawathag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawathag|gokishawathag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawathagnĂŒ|shawathagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawathagnknĂŒ|goshawathagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawathagnĂŒ|gokishawathagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawathagshĂ«|shawathagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawathagnkshĂ«|goshawathagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawathagshĂ«|gokishawathagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawathagro|shawathagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawathagnkro|goshawathagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawathagro|gokishawathagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawathagmu|shawathagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawathagnkmu|goshawathagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawathagmu|gokishawathagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawathagsher|shawathagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawathagnksher|goshawathagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawathagsher|gokishawathagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawathagng|shawathagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawathagnkng|goshawathagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawathagng|gokishawathagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawathagya|shawathagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawathagnkya|goshawathagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawathagya|gokishawathagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawathagyam|shawathagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawathagnkyam|goshawathagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawathagyam|gokishawathagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawathagnĂŒshĂ«|shawathagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawathagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawathagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawathagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawathagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawathagnĂŒro|shawathagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawathagnknĂŒro|goshawathagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawathagnĂŒro|gokishawathagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawathagnĂŒmu|shawathagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawathagnknĂŒmu|goshawathagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawathagnĂŒmu|gokishawathagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawathagshĂ«nĂŒ|shawathagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawathagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawathagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawathagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawathagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawathagshĂ«ro|shawathagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawathagnkshĂ«ro|goshawathagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawathagshĂ«ro|gokishawathagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawathagshĂ«mu|shawathagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawathagnkshĂ«mu|goshawathagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawathagshĂ«mu|gokishawathagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawathagronĂŒ|shawathagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawathagnkronĂŒ|goshawathagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawathagronĂŒ|gokishawathagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawathagroshĂ«|shawathagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawathagnkroshĂ«|goshawathagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawathagroshĂ«|gokishawathagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawathagromu|shawathagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawathagnkromu|goshawathagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawathagromu|gokishawathagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawathagmunĂŒ|shawathagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawathagnkmunĂŒ|goshawathagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawathagmunĂŒ|gokishawathagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawathagmushĂ«|shawathagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawathagnkmushĂ«|goshawathagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawathagmushĂ«|gokishawathagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawathagmuro|shawathagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawathagnkmuro|goshawathagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawathagmuro|gokishawathagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
